name: Daiko Denshi Tsushin, Ltd.
summary: Daiko Denshi Tsushin, Ltd. provides information technology solutions in Japan. It offers rBOM, a production management system for the manufacturing industry; PROCURESUITE, an indirect materials procurement support system; EdiGate/POST, a cloud-type WEB-EDI service; RetailFocus, an inventory management system for specialty stores; IOT/IOW; AppGuard, a security solution; i-Compass, a cloud-based information distribution solution; and D's Mobile, a mobile leased line service solution, as well as fishing cooperative economic systems. The company was founded in 1953 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
